title: Commitment
tmdbOverview: The son of a North Korean spy decides to follow in his father's footsteps to protect his little sister.
synopsis: Commitment is a 2013 action, thriller and drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 14A certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
